videos.topic: 5 Interview Questions That Trip Up Even Experienced Candidates
videos.hook: These 5 questions catch even senior candidates off guard — here's how to answer them.
videos.script_outline: Open with why experience doesn't always help; question 1: Tell me about yourself; question 2: Why are you leaving; question 3: Weakness question trap; question 4: Where do you see yourself; question 5: Do you have questions; close with practicing on SelectPrep.

videos.topic: How to Answer 'Tell Me About Yourself' Without Rambling
videos.hook: The first question of every interview is also the easiest to mess up.
videos.script_outline: Frame the problem: most answers are too long or too generic; show the 3-part structure; demonstrate with an example; explain how to tailor to the role; mention SelectPrep's instant feedback.
